task: OpenClaw Gmail lookup and evidence-backed content brief

governance_bootstrap.summary: Customer-facing code needs evidence mapping, real entrypoint verification, and residual-risk reporting when a gate is incomplete.
OpenClaw Slack ingress is Mac Mini only; customer-facing changes need completion evidence and explicit non-completion when Red Team is blocked.

verification.name: OpenClaw Gmail brief unit and regression suite
verification.result: 75 tests passed, including Slack verification-code grouping/redaction, human-conclusion rendering, and discardable-noise output.

verification.name: Configured Gmail runtime through OpenClaw user-facing agent entrypoint
verification.command: .venv/bin/python inline call to openclaw_agent.run('오늘 온 메일 내용 요약해') with response content suppressed
verification.result: gmail_alert_priority_runtime=pass; unrelated Google Alerts did not appear in the review bucket.

verification.name: Mac Mini OpenClaw Slack listener deployment and process verification
verification.target: Mac Mini launchd Slack Socket Mode service
verification.command: scripts/deploy_to_macmini.sh adapters/content/openclaw_agent.py; ssh macmini launchctl kickstart and launchctl print
verification.result: Targeted checkout matched origin/main with diff 0; backup scratch/pre_deploy_backup_20260720_221710 created; com.harness.slack-listener state=running pid=3962; log confirmed a new Socket Mode session and Bolt app running.

verification.name: Real-user Slack DM E2E probe command contract
verification.target: Slack API and Mac Mini OpenClaw listener
verification.result: Pass. The probe reads only an xoxp user token from macOS Keychain, explicitly reports SSH-vs-GUI Keychain access failure, verifies token ownership against SLACK_CEO_USER_ID, and requires explicit --send before one real DM.

verification.name: Slack listener CEO user-token event guard
verification.result: 3 tests passed. CEO user-token E2E messages tagged with bot_id are accepted; non-CEO bot traffic and subtype events remain ignored.

verification.name: Slack E2E final-reply selection
verification.result: 1 test passed. The asynchronous processing acknowledgement is not accepted as the final answer.

verification.name: Real CEO Slack DM E2E acceptance
verification.target: Mac Mini GUI Keychain user token, Slack DM, and OpenClaw listener
verification.result: Pass. CEO token ownership verified; test DM sent; final OpenClaw reply received; zero quality failures after verification-code/link redaction and final-reply selection.

deploy.result: Targeted Mac Mini deploy passed origin/main diff verification and Slack listener was restarted successfully.

residual_risk: This commit establishes Gmail as the first reference adapter. The all-intent verifier architecture remains planned work.
